code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 10 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_all(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(s, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut parsing = true
      while parsing and i < n
        let bb = byte_or_zero(s, i)
        if bb >= 48 and bb <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (bb - 48)
          i = i + 1
        else
          parsing = false
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, sign * num)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_dedup(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let min_val = match list.min(remaining)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
    result = list.push(result, min_val)
    mut new_list: List<Int> = []
    mut j = 0
    let rn = remaining.len()
    while j < rn
      let v = match remaining.get(j)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
      if v != min_val
        new_list = list.push(new_list, v)
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_list
  end
  result
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let nums = parse_all(input)
let sorted = sort_dedup(nums)

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
let total = sorted.len()
while k < total
  let v = match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
